title: Create pulse from a mention
excerpt: Is there a way to create an item/pulse when a specific member on the team gets tagged? Struggling with the limited visibility on how many requests specific team members are getting and what kind of bandwidth they have.

posts.author: jdss2222 (John Stokes)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to create an item/pulse when a specific member on the team gets tagged? Struggling with the limited visibility on how many requests specific team members are getting and what kind of bandwidth they have.

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @jdss2222 ,

Yes, you can use Make as a solution to create an item or pulse when a specific team member gets tagged.
